## Checklist

- [ ] If this PR changes user-facing street app behavior, update `apps/many-lives-web/src/lib/street/streetReleaseNotes.ts` with this PR's feature note, PR/source, and build identity, then verify the release popup does not still show the previous PR.
- [ ] Run the narrowest required validation from `AGENTS.md` and `docs/street/runtime-operating-manual.md`, then note the commands and any inspected screenshots below.
